/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_get_logging_directory.dir/test/test_get_logging_directory.cpp.o -o test_get_logging_directory  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcl_logging_interface:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a librcl_logging_interface.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib/librcpputils.so -pthread /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
